name: engram
description: Persistent memory for Claude Code. v6 BREAKING: per-workstation API tokens replace the shared admin token. Issue a keycard via the dashboard /tokens page after upgrade and paste it via /engram:setup. The operator key (ENGRAM_AUTH_ADMIN_TOKEN) lives ONLY on the server host and MUST NOT be pasted into a workstation.

api_token.title: API Token (worker keycard)
api_token.description: Per-workstation API token issued via the engram dashboard /tokens page. NOT the operator/admin token (which lives only on the server host). Generate one via the UI, copy it once, paste it here. Revoke from the same page if the workstation is compromised. After rotation, re-run /engram:setup. (v6 breaking: previous versions accepted the operator token here — that is no longer valid.)
